scenes.text:
If you feel like an imposter,
congratulations. You are in the arena.

Seventy percent of people experience imposter syndrome. That includes CEOs, doctors, and world-class athletes. The only people who never feel like imposters are
those who never try anything new. Imposter syndrome is not a sign of weakness. It is a sign that you are growing.

The cure is not more preparation. It is more exposure. You do not overcome imposter syndrome by
studying. You overcome it by doing the thing until the thing becomes part of who you are.

You do not need to feel qualified.
You just need to keep showing up.

Have you felt like an imposter? You are
not alone. Follow for real confidence tips.
